forgotPassword.title: Passwort vergessen
forgotPassword.subtitle: Geben Sie die E-Mail Ihres Trainer-Kontos ein. Wir senden Ihnen einen Link zum Zurücksetzen.
forgotPassword.successDefault: Falls die E-Mail registriert ist, erhalten Sie in wenigen Minuten einen Link.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Fehler beim Senden. Bitte erneut versuchen.

resetPassword.title: Passwort zurücksetzen
resetPassword.subtitle: Geben Sie unten Ihr neues Passwort ein.
resetPassword.success: Passwort erfolgreich zurückgesetzt! Melden Sie sich mit dem neuen Passwort an.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Fehler beim Zurücksetzen. Bitte erneut versuchen.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Ungültiger Link. Fordern Sie eine neue E-Mail unter Passwort vergessen an.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Das Passwort muss mindestens 6 Zeichen haben.

blocked.title: Zahlung ausstehend
blocked.message1: Wir haben eine ausstehende Monatszahlung festgestellt. Der Zugang zu Trainings wurde automatisch gesperrt.
blocked.message2: Begleichen Sie die Zahlung, um den Zugang wiederherzustellen. Nach Bestätigung werden Trainings freigeschaltet.
blocked.whatsappMessage: Hallo! Ich möchte meine Zahlung begleichen, um den Zugang zu den Trainings freizuschalten.

subscription.proActiveDesc: You have unlimited students and all plan benefits.
subscription.linkedToStore: Subscription linked to your store account.
subscription.cancelNote: Cancel in App Store or Google Play settings. You keep Pro until the paid period ends.

subscription.subscribeViaStore: Subscribe via App Store / Google Play

register.welcomeTitle: Let's set up your professional space
register.welcomeSubtitle: In a few steps you'll be ready to train clients with organization.
register.identitySubtitle: Your name will appear to students in the app.
register.accessSubtitle: Phone and CREF are optional but help with credibility.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

account.deletePersonalDesc: Permanently removes your trainer account, all students, workouts and associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteStudentDesc: Permanently removes your student profile, workout history and progress. This cannot be undone.
account.personalBullet1: Your trainer account will be removed
account.personalBullet2: All your students will be deleted
account.personalBullet3: Workouts, messages and history will be erased
account.studentBullet1: Your student profile will be removed
account.studentBullet2: Your workout history and progress will be erased
account.studentBullet3: You will need a new registration to use the app again
account.confirmPasswordIntro: Enter your password to confirm your identity:
account.acknowledge: I understand all my data will be permanently deleted and I cannot recover this account.
account.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.

legal.disclosure: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on App Store/Google Play at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.
legal.cancelHow: Cancel in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions (iOS) or play.google.com → Subscriptions (Android).

preview.title: Preview — student view
preview.simulationHint: Simulation of how the student will see the app on mobile
